title: Make Ahead Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Place potatoes in a saucepan and add water to cover and 1 teaspoon kosher salt.
Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat to medium and simmer for 25 minutes or until potatoes are very tender.
Return potatoes to pan and mash with a potato masher.
Add 4 tablespoons butter, cream cheese, sour cream, milk and 1 teaspoon salt.
Mix until all ingredients are blended.
Spoon mixture into a lightly greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
Brush top of mixture with melted butter.
Bake immediately, or cover and refrigerate.
If refrigerated, let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before baking.
Bake at 350°F, uncovered for 30 minutes or until hot.
notes: Can serve immediately after mixing or save for later.
Can keep in a crockpot on warm setting.
If refrigerated, let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before baking.
Usually made for Thanksgiving or when cooking for a crowd.
